entries.name: localization-warm-cache
entries.purpose: Every 30 minutes: refresh Redis LRU cache with top-N hit keys per tenant + locale.

entries.name: localization-prune-stale-translations
entries.purpose: Daily 03:00 UTC: delete source='ai' Translation rows past TTL + rows with is_stale=true and no recent access.

entries.name: localization-reconcile-cache
entries.purpose: Hourly at :15: reconcile Redis LRU cache against DB counts + fix drift.
